title: Fix Open Positions endpoint to use fapi/v2/positionRisk

requirements.summary: Update Binance position risk endpoint from v1 to v2 in frontend code
acceptanceCriteria: No code in the frontend references the v1 positionRisk endpoint (`fapi/v1/positionRisk`)
All position risk fetch calls use `https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v2/positionRisk`
HMAC-SHA256 signing, polling interval (5–10 seconds), and credential handling from localStorage remain unchanged
Open Positions section in the Search tab successfully returns and renders live position data from the v2 endpoint

file_operations.description: Update the fetchOpenPositions function to use the v2 positionRisk endpoint URL `https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v2/positionRisk` instead of v1. Keep all HMAC-SHA256 signing logic, timestamp generation, query string construction, and error handling exactly as-is.

Update the usePositionRisk query hook to reference the v2 positionRisk endpoint URL `https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v2/positionRisk` in any fetch calls or comments. Preserve the existing polling interval (5–10 seconds), HMAC signing, credential retrieval from localStorage, and query configuration.
